name: Genesis - 创世争霸
publisher: Hainan Legendkey Network Technology Co., Ltd.
short_description: Genesis is a controller exclusive next generation online-competitive MOBA. Utilizing Unreal 4 Engine, it boasts stunning graphics and smooth control. Genesis differentiates from classic MOBA games by opting for joystick control which is highly optimized （Mouse and keyboard control is not supported）.
detailed_description:
Early Beta Access

This is a open beta version, please let us know your advise, thanks!


About the Game

Genesis is a controller exclusive next generation online-competitive MOBA. Utilizing Unreal 4 Engine, it boasts stunning graphics and smooth control. Genesis differentiates from classic MOBA games by opting for joystick control which is highly optimized and extremely intuitive. Set in a futuristic sci-fi world where gods and men clash to claim dominion, players can experience the joy of Genesis in its PVP or PVE game modes. The game will initially feature a rich roster of 30 heroes and a wide selection of hero, weapon and item cosmetics. Genesis is slated to be published on PC and PS4 in the spring of 2019. Players may provide feedback via communities listed below: Youtube: Rampage Games Twitter: @RampageGames_CN Facebook: Genesis_Official FB Group (Genesis Open Beta Feedback): https://www.facebook.com/groups/496976240827116/ Discord： https://discord.gg/EQPszfS Official Website： http://www.genesismoba.com
